examples: The leading banks are expected to redouble their efforts to keep the value of the dollar down.
There isn't much time ahead, so we should redouble our effort.
We will have to redouble our loving care of the saplings that have just been planted.
To succeed, we must redouble our efforts to combat new forms of poverty and social exclusion.
Freed from the need to court popularity, he should now redouble his efforts at reform.
